title: [Skyship, The Ropes]
description: A flat, packed dirt floor lined with unlit candles covers the area.  Above, thick white ropes hang in broad and bulbous tangled knots.  Visible in these tangles are desiccated bodies of varying races, each appearing whole but glossy, as if they had been coated in a thin layer of wax before being collected within the ropes.  Runic symbols appear on the floor below each prominent tangled body, all drawn in a bright white paint.
